pageContext.name: Spooky Space Kook
pageContext.description: The Spooky Space Kook is one of those rare, vintage Scooby-Doo monsters that deserves more recognition.  Bring this exciting sixth scale diorama into your collection today to display your love for this classic series! Using a unique light-up feature, you can bring out nostalgic memories of the original show!  In addition, this officially licensed Hanna-Barbera collectible also includes an alternate head sculpt, which displays him unmasked, revealing his true identity: Henry Bascomb!  Add this Scooby-Doo villain to your collection!
